title: toona ciliata var. kingii
intro: Toona ciliata var. kingii, also known as the King's timber or Australian cedar, is a deciduous tree native to Australia and Southeast Asia, belonging to the family Meliaceae. The medicinal properties of Toona ciliata var. kingii are attributed to its bark, leaves, and seeds, which contain compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a potential treatment for various ailments. Toona ciliata var. kingii can be prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, and its extracts have been used in traditional medicine for centuries.
